mapper.insert: insert into fp_logical_object_instance (id, tenant_id, logical_object_id, physical_object_type, physical_object_id, physical_object_code, physical_object_name, status, metric_json, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{logicalObjectId}, #{physicalObjectType}, #{physicalObjectId}, #{physicalObjectCode}, #{physicalObjectName}, #{status}, #{metricJson}, #{firstSeenAt}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{metadataJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_logical_object_instance set physical_object_id = #{physicalObjectId}, physical_object_name = #{physicalObjectName}, status = #{status}, metric_json = #{metricJson}, last_seen_at = #{lastSeenAt}, metadata_json = #{metadataJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_logical_object_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and logical_object_id = #{logicalObjectId}
